  • Uses of Game in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model with parameters of type Game
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Player
    GameState.determineWinner(Game game)
    Computes the winner once the game is over.
    void
    GameObserver.gameStatusChanged(Game game)
    Invoked after any change to the game state.
    void
    Card.onRoundEndTrigger(Game game)
    Round-end hook: apply this card's end-of-round effect.
    default void
    GameState.pickBonusCard(Game game, Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the optional end-of-round bonus pick.
    default void
    GameState.pickCards(Game game, Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves a player's card pick for the offer tile their totem sits on.
    default void
    GameState.placeTotemOnOffer(Game game, Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places the given player's totem on an offer tile.
    default void
    GameState.resolveEvents(Game game)
    Triggers every end-of-round Event currently in play.
    default void
    GameState.startMatch(Game game)
    Starts the match (deck setup, initial deal, turn order).
    default void
    GameState.updateRound(Game game)
    Performs end-of-round cleanup, board refill and turn-order update.

  • Uses of Game in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states with parameters of type Game
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Player
    EndGameState.determineWinner(Game game)
    Finds the winner by highest Player.finalPP(), breaking ties by food.
    void
    BonusCardSelectionState.pickBonusCard(Game game, Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the bonus pick: validate the chosen card, charge its cost and add it to the player's tribe, then continue with event resolution.
    void
    ActionResolutionState.pickCards(Game game, Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves the active player's action for the tile their totem occupies.
    void
    TotemPlacementState.placeTotemOnOffer(Game game, Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places the player's totem on the chosen tile, then either passes the turn to the next player or, if everyone has placed, starts the action phase.
    void
    EventResolutionState.resolveEvents(Game game)
    Triggers the round's events in priority order and hands off to the round update.
    void
    SetUpState.startMatch(Game game)
    Sets up the match and transitions to the totem-placement phase.
    void
    RoundUpdateState.updateRound(Game game)
    Performs the cleanup, refill, Era handling and turn-order update, then transitions to the next phase.

    Method
    Description
